descriptions: Latella 'ndrina allied with Nicolò in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2013, investigations discovered that the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

Taliban (gang).description: The Taliban is a Kenyan criminal organization based in Nairobi slums, founded around 2001 as an offshoot of the Baghdad Boys. They belong to the Luo tribe and are led by Joash Oluande. They are involved in providing security at bus stops and controlling public transport routes, often clashing with the rival Mungiki gang. The group has political ties to Raila Odinga's Orange Democratic Movement.

descriptions: Taliban Gang is listed as a rival of 39ers gang in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Taliban Gang

descriptions: Satan's Syndicate patched over to become a Black Pistons chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: On March 5, 2002, the Satan's Syndicate biker club in Columbus, Ohio "patched over" to become the first Black Pistons chapter in the United States.

descriptions: IS-AP is an official affiliate of IS.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Azerbaijan Province (IS-AP) emerged in 2019 and operates in Azerbaijan. Its adeherents were previously recruited by both the Islamic State – Caucasus Province (IS-CP) and Islamic State – Khorasan Province (ISIS-K).

descriptions: IS-AP's adherents were recruited by IS-CP.
edges.evidence_quote: Its adeherents were previously recruited by both the Islamic State – Caucasus Province (IS-CP) and Islamic State – Khorasan Province (ISIS-K).

Caligiuri.description: The Caligiuri are a 'ndrina of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta, originating from Bagnara Calabra, Italy. They operate in Petronà and Cirò Marina, with connections in Lazio, Lombardy, Germany, and the United States (Brooklyn, New York), allied with the Colombo and Gambino families. They were involved in a family feud against the Santoro clan from the 1970s to the 1990s, marked by multiple murders. The clan engaged in heroin trafficking from Thailand to Rome.

descriptions: The Caligiuri collaborated with the De Stefano-Tegano in the murder of Giovanni Santoro.
edges.evidence_quote: cominciarono con l'assassinio del boss cirotano Giovanni Santoro detto " fortezza " ammazzato con 15 colpi di pistola a Cirò Marina il 30 agosto del 1977 con la collaborazione dei De Stefano-Tegano .

descriptions: The Caligiuri are allies of the Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Farao-Marincola e con i Coco-Trovato .

descriptions: The Caligiuri have a family feud against the Santoro.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta scoppia la faida famigliare contro i Santoro di Cirò Marina

descriptions: The Caligiuri are allies of the Coco-Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Farao-Marincola e con i Coco-Trovato .

descriptions: White Tigers fought turf wars with Green Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: Throughout the 80s, the gang was often engaged in bloody turf wars with other Queens gangs, such as the younger Green Dragons.

Free Souls Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in Eugene, Oregon in 1969. Has chapters in Oregon, Washington, Germany, and Australia. Its center patch features an ankh over a motorcycle wheel on handlebars, with blue and white colors.

descriptions: Latin Brothers are listed as allies of the Gaylords in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: People Nation , Latin Kings , Insane South Side Popes , 12th Street Players, Indiana Aryan Brotherhood, Vice Lords , Latin Brothers

descriptions: Latin Brothers are allies of Latin Counts per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Vice Lords, Latin Brothers, Spanish Lords, People Nation

Satanas.description: Filipino American street gang based in Southern California, founded in 1972. Believed to be the oldest Filipino-American street gang in Los Angeles. Involved in gang violence, murder, drug trafficking, and theft. Active across multiple California counties and the Philippines.

descriptions: The Avenues are rivals with Satanas.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Satanas

descriptions: Infobox lists Satanas as a rival of Bahala Na Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Satanas , Bahala Na Barkada , Pinoy Real

descriptions: Demonios originated from Satanas members.
edges.evidence_quote: Some other Filipino gangs such as the Demonios and Diablos (not the Mexican gang of the same name) claim their roots to Satanas, having originated amongst second generation STS members and younger siblings of individuals who were members of STS; the founders of many other Filipino American gangs were originally members of Satanas.

descriptions: Diablos originated from Satanas members.
edges.evidence_quote: Some other Filipino gangs such as the Demonios and Diablos (not the Mexican gang of the same name) claim their roots to Satanas, having originated amongst second generation STS members and younger siblings of individuals who were members of STS; the founders of many other Filipino American gangs were originally members of Satanas.

descriptions: Satanas is allied with Avenue King Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Avenue King Crips , Temple Street (gang)

descriptions: Satanas has a rivalry with Avenues.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues , Bahala Na Gang

descriptions: Satanas has a rivalry with Bahala Na Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues , Bahala Na Gang

descriptions: A Satanas member killed a Lemonwood Chiques member.
edges.evidence_quote: In November 1989 Manuel Rodriguez, a member of the Lemonwood Chiques gang, was shot and killed by Arnell Salagubang, a member of the Satanas gang.

descriptions: Satanas is allied with Temple Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Avenue King Crips , Temple Street (gang)

descriptions: Temple Street gang is allied with Satanas.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sureños , Satanas , Mexican Mafia , Florencia 13 , MS-13 , White Fence

descriptions: The Dhak group is listed as a rival of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Dhak group (lower mainland)

descriptions: Lobos is a faction within the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the Lobos (The wolves) were established in Laredo.

descriptions: Lobos listed as ally of Kings Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Lobos

descriptions: Lobos listed as an ally of Rebels in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Satan's Choice , Kings Crew Motorcycle Club , Lobos and, later, the Hells Angels

descriptions: CDN and RDA were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: O CDN tinha uma aliança com outra facção amazonense, os Revolucionários do Amazonas (RDA).

descriptions: RDA is a splinter group of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: some leaving to join a CV splinter group known as "Revolucionarios do Amazonas" (Revolutionaries of Amazonas; RDA)

descriptions: RDA and PCC are allied against CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Atualmente há informações que apontam uma aliança entre o RDA e o PCC contra o avanço do Comando Vermelho no Amazonas.

descriptions: RDA, a CV splinter, later joined PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: some leaving to join a CV splinter group known as "Revolucionarios do Amazonas" (Revolutionaries of Amazonas; RDA), which later joined PCC in the state.

descriptions: CWS is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Elephant and Castle Mob and Hoxton Gang , CWS

descriptions: CWS is listed as an ally of Peckham Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: CWS, T-Block , ABM (All Bout Money), Firehouse Crew, OTB, Wooly Road Youngers

descriptions: Parrello and Piccolo were in conflict in the second Palmi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida di Palmi , esplosa il 25 settembre 1986 tra i Parrello e i Piccolo con l'omicidio del capocosca Gaetano Parrello

descriptions: Spook Hunters attacked black youths, leading to formation of The Slausons for self-defense.
edges.evidence_quote: In response to these white racist gangs, the black youths formed their own gangs to protect themselves and their neighborhoods: The Slausons, the Businessmen, and the Gladiators were all formed as a direct reaction to attacks from white gangs like the Spook Hunters.

Kuratong Baleleng.description: Kuratong Baleleng is an organized crime syndicate in the Philippines, originally established in 1986 as an anti-communist vigilante group. It became one of the largest syndicates in the country, involved in kidnapping, drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. The group gained nationwide attention after a 1995 shootout with police in Quezon City. Despite the death of its first leader, the syndicate has scattered across provinces and some members have entered politics.

descriptions: Kuratong Baleleng had ties to Maguindanao guerrillas, leading to Muslim clans joining.
edges.evidence_quote: ties to the Maguindanao guerrillas led Muslim Maguindanaon clans to join

descriptions: Road Knights and Damned were in a war with violent incidents.
edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s, the Road Knights became involved in a war with the Damned which resulted in several violent incidents.

Doddington gang.description: Primarily Afro-Caribbean street gang based in Moss Side, Manchester, United Kingdom. Originated from the Pepperhill Crew in the 1980s and named after Dodington Close. Engaged in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, robbery, kidnapping, and murder. Known for rivalries with the Cheetham Hill Gang and Gooch Close Gang, contributing to the 'Gunchester' era. Still active as of the 2000s.

descriptions: Cheetham Hill Gang was in a turf war with Pepperhill Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s and 1990s, the Cheetham Hill Gang was involved in a turf war with Moss Side gangs, particularly the Pepperhill Mob and later Doddington Gang.

descriptions: Cheetham Hill Gang was in a turf war with Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s and 1990s, the Cheetham Hill Gang was involved in a turf war with Moss Side gangs, particularly the Pepperhill Mob and later Doddington Gang.

descriptions: Doddington gang was rival of Cheetham Hill Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang became rivals of the Cheetham Hill Gang and the Gooch Close Gang during the late 1980s and early 1990s

descriptions: Pepperhill Mob and Cheetham Hill Gang were in violent conflict over drug territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pepperhill Mob, rich and well armed despite their youth, fought back. The two gangs vied with each other in stabbings, tit-for-tat shootings and murder

descriptions: Pepperhill Mob was in a gang war with Cheetham Hill Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s and early 1990s, the Pepperhill Gang were involved in a gang war between Moss Side and the Cheetham Hill Gang from North Manchester.

descriptions: Doddington gang was rival of Gooch Close Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang became rivals of the Cheetham Hill Gang and the Gooch Close Gang during the late 1980s and early 1990s

descriptions: Doddington gang had a fierce rivalry with Gooch Close Gang over drug trade.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1990s, the Pepperhill/Doddington group developed a fierce rivalry with the Gooch Close Gang.

descriptions: Haydock Close Crew is a junior faction spawned from Doddington.
edges.evidence_quote: Doddington gave rise to the ... Haydock Close Crew

descriptions: Haydock Close Crew is a faction of the Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Halton was wrongly presumed to be a Haydock Close Crew member, a Doddington faction based in Stretford

descriptions: Longsight Crew was a rival off-shoot of Doddington gang.
edges.evidence_quote: A rival off-shoot of the Doddington gang, the Longsight Crew (composed of younger Doddington members from the Longsight and Ardwick areas) attempted to sell in the areas occupied by the Pit Bull Crew, resulting in yet another turf war.

descriptions: Active Only is listed as an ally of Doddington in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Moss Side Bloods , Longsight Crew , Haydock Close Crew , Portuguese Mafia , Active Only , Top Crash Gang , Paul Massey (gangster)

descriptions: Moss Side Bloods is a junior faction spawned from Doddington.
edges.evidence_quote: Doddington gave rise to the Moss Side Bloods

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew was a rival off-shoot of Doddington that aligned with Gooch.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pit Bull Crew paradoxically aligned itself with the Gooch gang, deepening the violent divisions not only between Doddington and Gooch but within Doddington's ranks itself.

descriptions: Portuguese Mafia is a junior faction spawned from Doddington.
edges.evidence_quote: Doddington gave rise to the ... Portuguese Mafia

descriptions: Rusholme Crew Gangsters is listed as a rival of Doddington in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gooch Close Gang , Younger Gooch Close , Cheetham Hill Gang , Longsight Street Soldiers , Pit Bull Crew , Fallowfield Mad Dogs , Old Trafford Crips , Rusholme Crew Gangsters

descriptions: Top Crash Gang is listed as an ally of Doddington in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Moss Side Bloods , Longsight Crew , Haydock Close Crew , Portuguese Mafia , Active Only , Top Crash Gang , Paul Massey (gangster)

descriptions: Younger Gooch Close is listed as a rival of Doddington in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gooch Close Gang , Younger Gooch Close , Cheetham Hill Gang , Longsight Street Soldiers , Pit Bull Crew , Fallowfield Mad Dogs , Old Trafford Crips , Rusholme Crew Gangsters

descriptions: Fallowfield Mandem inherited conflict with Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: inheriting their war with Doddington and Longsight

descriptions: Gooch Close Gang had violent disputes with Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with many other South Manchester gangs, most notably The Doddington Gang (formerly known as the Pepperhill Mob)

descriptions: Gooch Close Gang and Pepperhill Mob were in a fierce war.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pepperhill Gang declared that nobody from South Manchester was to have dealings with Cheetham Hill. This angered the Gooch and a fierce war erupted

descriptions: Infoboox lists Doddington Gang as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Doddington Gang

descriptions: Infoboox lists Pepperhill Mob as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Pepperhill Mob

descriptions: Gooch and Doddington had violent disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with many other South Manchester gangs, most notably The Doddington Gang

descriptions: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with the Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with many other South Manchester gangs, most notably The Doddington Gang

descriptions: A truce between Gooch and Doddington ended.
edges.evidence_quote: This murder signalled the end of the Gooch-Doddington truce.

descriptions: Longsight Crew is an offshoot of Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: the newly emerging Longsight Crew, a younger offshoot of the Doddington Gang

descriptions: Longsight Street Soldiers were in conflict with Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: began a violent dispute with the Longsight Crew and the Doddington Gang

descriptions: Moss Side Bloods are a splinter group of Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Moss Side Bloods, which were a Doddington splinter group

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew was in conflict with Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The PBC waged war on the Longsight Crew and the Doddington

descriptions: Dödspatrullen and Shottaz have been in a gang war since 2015, resulting in multiple deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: Dödspatrullen has been in a gang war with Shottaz, another Swedish Somali criminal organization originating from Rinkeby, since 2015.

descriptions: Hells Angels founder broke from Pissed Off Bastards, indicating a split.
edges.evidence_quote: Otto Friedli, a World War II veteran, is credited with starting the club after breaking from the Pissed Off Bastards motorcycle club over a feud with a rival gang.

'Ndrina Carelli.description: The 'Ndrina Carelli is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Corigliano Calabro, Italy. It operates primarily in Germany, involved in drug trafficking in cities such as Bochum, Münster, Frankfurt, Berlin, and Munich. The clan is allied with the Roma of Lauropoli and the Critelli clan of Cariati. It has been targeted in operations such as 'Santa Tecla' in 2010, which led to numerous arrests and asset seizures.

descriptions: The Carelli are allied with the Critelli di Cariati.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con gli zingari di Lauropoli e con i Critelli di Cariati.

descriptions: The Carelli are allied with the Zingari di Lauropoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con gli zingari di Lauropoli e con i Critelli di Cariati.

descriptions: The Ramashish Koeri gang cooperated with these four gangs in committing murders.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang, along with four other caste-based gangs led by Ghamari Karwar, Rambachan Yadav, Triveni Kahar, and Gaurik was responsible for over hundred murders in the Kaimur region.

descriptions: Antinori and Wall fought a decade-long war.
edges.evidence_quote: By the 1930s, Antinori and Wall were in a bloody decade-long war, which would later be known as 'Era of Blood'.

descriptions: Santo Trafficante Sr. joined Antinori's organization and they cooperated on Bolita games.
edges.evidence_quote: Antinori took notice of Santo Trafficante and invited him into his organization and together they expanded the Bolita games across the state of Florida.

descriptions: East Side White Pride allegedly had ties to WAR.
edges.evidence_quote: three white Aryan supremacists who were members of East Side White Pride, which allegedly had ties to WAR

Clan Russo di Nola.description: The Clan Russo di Nola is a Camorra organization operating in Nola, Italy, founded by brothers Pasquale and Salvatore Russo in the 1980s. Originally lieutenants of Carmine Alfieri, they replaced the Alfieri clan after his downfall. Despite arrests of its leaders, the clan remains active and has expanded into new territories, forming alliances with other Camorra clans.

descriptions: The Emanuele family is one of the families belonging to the Locale di Ariola.
edges.evidence_quote: famiglie Loielo, Gallace , Emanuele, Maiolo

descriptions: Loielo bosses were killed in 2002 due to conflicts with the Emanuele family.
edges.evidence_quote: contrasti con gli Emanuele

descriptions: Remaining Maiolo members later aligned with the Emanuele family.
edges.evidence_quote: I Maiolo rimasti rimarranno per un periodo con Loielo per poi passare con gli Emanuele

descriptions: Westmob associates with Oakdale Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: Westmob is known to associate with the Oakdale Mob and Sunnydale Gangsters.

descriptions: Hells Angels and East Bay Dragons have a mutual friendship and socialize together.
edges.evidence_quote: Tobie Levingston, who formed the black motorcycle club East Bay Dragons MC, wrote in his book that he and Barger have a long-lasting friendship and that the Hells Angels and Dragons have a mutual friendship and hang out and ride together.

descriptions: Johnston Rd. Lenox Street Boys is listed as a rival of Columbia Point Dawgs in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Orchard Park Trailblazers , Ashmont, Mt. Pleasant, Johnston Rd. Lenox Street Boys , Heath st

descriptions: Carder Planet succeeded Counterfeit Library.
edges.evidence_quote: counterfeitlibrary.com ... would be followed up by carderplanet.com owned by Dmitry Golubov

descriptions: ShadowCrew emerged from Counterfeit Library.
edges.evidence_quote: ShadowCrew emerged early in 2002 from another underground site, counterfeitlibrary.com , which was run by Brett Johnson

descriptions: Outlaws pressured Sinners to show allegiance, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1992, around forty members of the Outlaws crashed a party being held by the Milwaukee-based Sinners Motorcycle Club and thereafter began pressuring the Sinners to wear an "A.O.A." patch on their vests to show allegiance to the Outlaws.

Genovese crime family Springfield factio.description: The Springfield faction of the Genovese crime family is a group of Italian-American mobsters controlling organized crime in Springfield, Massachusetts. It was founded in the 1920s and is led by a caporegime. The faction engages in racketeering, illegal gambling, loansharking, and extortion. It has been active since the 1920s and remains operational.

descriptions: The Springfield faction is a sub-unit of the Genovese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Springfield faction of the Genovese crime family is a group of Italian-American mobsters who control organized crime activities in the Springfield, Massachusetts area.

descriptions: The Genovese Springfield faction and Gambino family had territorial tension that was resolved.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2024, longtime West Springfield mobster Frank "Frankie Pugs" Pugliano helped the Genovese family end territory tension after Gambino mobster Carmine "Carm the Barber" Manzi, also based in Springfield, began expanding rackets into the Hartford area of Connecticut.

Los Lagartos.description: Ecuadorian narcoterrorist cartel based in Guayaquil, founded as 'Los Cubanos' and initially engaged in contract killings. It now handles international drug trafficking, micro-trafficking, extortion, and robbery, providing logistics and security for groups like the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. Considered the second most powerful criminal group in Ecuador after Los Choneros, with whom it fiercely competes for territory. The group recruits young people from marginalized neighborhoods and has operated within the prison system for at least a decade.

descriptions: Los Chone Killers list Los Lagartos as occasional enemies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros , Latin Kings , Los Lagartos (en ocasiones)

descriptions: Los Choneros have Los Lagartos as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Lagartos, Los Lobos, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers

descriptions: Los Lagartos are enemies of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Lagartos

descriptions: Los Lagartos provide logistics, drug storage, and security services to CJNG in exchange for payment.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lagartos prestan servicios logísticos, de acopio de droga y seguridad a traficantes como los del Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generación de México que paga con dinero, armas, heroína o productos para la venta local.

descriptions: Los Lagartos are the fiercest rivals of Los Choneros, competing for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Son los máximos rivales acérrimos de Los Choneros con quienes se disputan el control de territorios y de plazas

descriptions: White Fence and El Hoyo Maravilla have a long-standing rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The rivalry between the gang and another Hispanic gang, El Hoyo Maravilla, is one of the longest, ongoing feuds in all of Los Angeles, a rivalry going back to the 1930s.

descriptions: Many Rock Machine members were formerly in the Executeurs.
edges.evidence_quote: The majority of the Rock Machine were former members of the Merciless Riders, the Executeurs and the SS.

descriptions: D-Company clashed with and eliminated the Pathan gang leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: This ultimately led them to clash with the Pathan gang, the most influential gang in Mumbai at the time. By 1986, D-Company had eliminated most of the Pathan gang leadership, emerging as the dominant gang in Mumbai.

edges.target: Al-Qaeda in the Lands Beyond the Sahel
descriptions: Al-Qaeda in the Lands Beyond the Sahel was a former affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda in the Lands Beyond the Sahel (inactive since 2015)
